sentence: 浴室里装了电热毛巾架。
pinyin: Yùshì lǐ zhuāng le diànrè máojīn jià.
english: An electric heated towel rail was installed in the bathroom.

sentence: 她潜意识里一直担心考试不及格。
pinyin: Tā qiányìshí lǐ yīzhí dānxīn kǎoshì bù jígé.
english: Deep in her subconscious she has always been worried about failing the exam.

meaning: 1. clan; 2. to clan together; 3. to flock together
sentence: 这里形成了一个高科技企业集群。
pinyin: Zhèlǐ xíngchéng le yī gè gāo kējì qǐyè jíqún.
english: A cluster of high-tech companies has formed here.

sentence: 作者把主人公的性格刻画得很生动。
pinyin: Zuòzhě bǎ zhǔréngōng de xìnggé kèhuà de hěn shēngdòng.
english: The author portrays the protagonist's personality very vividly.

sentence: 那个国家试射了一枚弹道导弹。
pinyin: Nàge guójiā shì shè le yī méi dàndào dǎodàn.
english: That country test-fired a ballistic missile.

sentence: 他压低声音，怕吵醒孩子。
pinyin: Tā yā dī shēngyīn, pà chǎo xǐng háizi.
english: He lowered his voice for fear of waking the child.

sentence: 爸爸的头发已经花白了。
pinyin: Bàba de tóufa yǐjīng huābái le.
english: Dad's hair has already turned grizzled.

sentence: 这座古老的圣殿每天都有人来参观。
pinyin: Zhè zuò gǔlǎo de shèngdiàn měitiān dōu yǒu rén lái cānguān.
english: This ancient temple receives visitors every day.

sentence: 她的订婚戒指是白金镶钻的。
pinyin: Tā de dìnghūn jièzhi shì báijīn xiāng zuàn de.
english: Her engagement ring is platinum set with diamonds.

sentence: 请把这些文件按日期归类。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎ zhèxiē wénjiàn àn rìqī guīlèi.
english: Please categorize these documents by date.

sentence: 这条陆上输油管线连接了两个城市。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo lùshàng shū yóu guǎnxiàn liánjiē le liǎng gè chéngshì.
english: This land-based oil pipeline connects two cities.

sentence: 他脾气不好，总是喜欢找麻烦。
pinyin: Tā píqì bù hǎo, zǒngshì xǐhuān zhǎo máfan.
english: He has a bad temper and is always looking for trouble.

sentence: 她去拍了一套个人写真。
pinyin: Tā qù pāi le yī tào gèrén xiězhēn.
english: She went to have a personal portrait photo set taken.

sentence: 我照着食谱做了一道新菜。
pinyin: Wǒ zhào zhe shípǔ zuò le yī dào xīn cài.
english: I followed a recipe and cooked a new dish.

sentence: 考古学家挖到了一块古代头骨。
pinyin: Kǎogǔ xuéjiā wā dào le yī kuài gǔdài tóugǔ.
english: Archaeologists unearthed an ancient skull.

sentence: 这位女星凭这部电影获了奖。
pinyin: Zhè wèi nǚxīng píng zhè bù diànyǐng huò le jiǎng.
english: This actress won an award for this film.

sentence: 那家工厂因为缺料而停产了。
pinyin: Nà jiā gōngchǎng yīnwèi quē liào ér tíngchǎn le.
english: That factory halted production because of a material shortage.

sentence: 这个理论的内核其实很简单。
pinyin: Zhège lǐlùn de nèihé qíshí hěn jiǎndān.
english: The core of this theory is actually quite simple.

sentence: 开幕式在一楼会议厅举行。
pinyin: Kāimùshì zài yī lóu huìyìtīng jǔxíng.
english: The opening ceremony was held in the first-floor conference hall.

sentence: 她的紧张情绪在脸上显露出来了。
pinyin: Tā de jǐnzhāng qíngxù zài liǎn shàng xiǎnlù chūlái le.
english: Her nervousness showed clearly on her face.

meaning: 1. parent and child; 2. parent-child (relationship); 3. two successive
sentence: 周末的亲子活动很受欢迎。
pinyin: Zhōumò de qīnzǐ huódòng hěn shòu huānyíng.
english: Weekend parent-child activities are very popular.

sentence: 我从巴黎寄了一张明信片给她。
pinyin: Wǒ cóng Bālí jì le yī zhāng míngxìnpiàn gěi tā.
english: I sent her a postcard from Paris.

meaning: 1. to dispatch (sb) in an official capacity; 2. to be posted (as an am
sentence: 公司派驻他去上海负责新项目。
pinyin: Gōngsī pàizhù tā qù Shànghǎi fùzé xīn xiàngmù.
english: The company posted him to Shanghai to oversee the new project.

sentence: 老国王去世后，王子继位了。
pinyin: Lǎo guówáng qùshì hòu, wángzǐ jìwèi le.
english: After the old king passed away, the prince succeeded to the throne.

sentence: 我们需要把计划具体化才能执行。
pinyin: Wǒmen xūyào bǎ jìhuà jùtǐhuà cái néng zhíxíng.
english: We need to make the plan concrete before we can carry it out.

sentence: 因为大雪，他们的行程受阻了。
pinyin: Yīnwèi dàxuě, tāmen de xíngchéng shòuzǔ le.
english: Their journey was blocked by heavy snow.

meaning: 1. to lay bare in a few words; 2. to expose with a word; 3. to point o
sentence: 他一句话就点破了她的小心思。
pinyin: Tā yī jù huà jiù diǎnpò le tā de xiǎo xīnsī.
english: He exposed her little secret with just one sentence.

meaning: 1. not to do one's best; 2. not to exert oneself
sentence: 他因管理不力被降职了。
pinyin: Tā yīn guǎnlǐ bùlì bèi jiàngzhí le.
english: He was demoted for failing to manage effectively.

sentence: 她写的短篇小说在杂志上发表了。
pinyin: Tā xiě de duǎnpiān xiǎoshuō zài zázhì shàng fābiǎo le.
english: The short story she wrote was published in a magazine.

sentence: 这个博物馆涵盖了很多艺术门类。
pinyin: Zhège bówùguǎn hángài le hěn duō yìshù ménlèi.
english: This museum covers many categories of art.

sentence: 这位老师态度和蔼可亲，学生都喜欢她。
pinyin: Zhè wèi lǎoshī tàidu hé'ǎi kěqīn, xuésheng dōu xǐhuān tā.
english: This teacher has a warm and friendly manner; all students like her.

meaning: 1. to grieve over sb's death; 2. to lament sb's death; 3. mo
sentence: 大家默哀一分钟，表示哀悼。
pinyin: Dàjiā mò'āi yī fēnzhōng, biǎoshì āidào.
english: Everyone observed a minute of silence to mourn.

sentence: 这档节目的受众主要是年轻人。
pinyin: Zhè dàng jiémù de shòuzhòng zhǔyào shì niánqīngrén.
english: The target audience for this program is mainly young people.

sentence: 她换上睡衣，准备去睡觉了。
pinyin: Tā huàn shàng shuìyī, zhǔnbèi qù shuìjiào le.
english: She changed into her pajamas and got ready for bed.

sentence: 去年全市工业总产值比前年增加了百分之八。
pinyin: Qù nián quán shì gōng yè zǒng chǎn zhí bǐ qián nián zēng jiā le bǎi fēn zhī bā.
english: Last year the city's total industrial output value increased by eight percent over the year before.

sentence: 她发愿要在有生之年走遍中国所有省份。
pinyin: Tā fā yuàn yào zài yǒu shēng zhī nián zǒu biàn Zhōng guó suǒ yǒu shěng fèn.
english: She vowed to visit every province in China in her lifetime.

sentence: 这个自治县有自己的地方语言和习俗。
pinyin: Zhè gè zì zhì xiàn yǒu zì jǐ de dì fāng yǔ yán hé xí sú.
english: This autonomous county has its own local language and customs.

sentence: 全球经济变局让很多企业不得不调整策略。
pinyin: Quánqiú jīngjì biànjú ràng hěnduō qǐyè bùdébù tiáozhěng cèlüè.
english: The shifting global economic situation has forced many companies to adjust their strategies.

sentence: 他在网上看了好几篇手机测评才决定买哪款。
pinyin: Tā zài wǎngshàng kànle hǎo jǐ piān shǒujī cèpíng cái juédìng mǎi nǎ kuǎn.
english: He read several phone reviews online before deciding which model to buy.

sentence: 奶奶有一个治咳嗽的老方子，特别管用。
pinyin: Nǎinai yǒu yīgè zhì késou de lǎo fāngzi, tèbié guǎnyòng.
english: Grandma has an old remedy for coughs that works really well.

sentence: 案件一审结果出来了，他被判两年。
pinyin: Ànjiàn yīshěn jiéguǒ chūlái le, tā bèi pàn liǎng nián.
english: The first-instance verdict came out — he was sentenced to two years.

meaning: (music) tonality; (of an actor, company, magazine etc) style; image; t
sentence: 这首歌的调性很轻快，适合夏天听。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu gē de diàoxìng hěn qīngkuài, shìhé xiàtiān tīng.
english: This song has a lively, upbeat tone — perfect for summer listening.

sentence: 冬天街上常有人卖新鲜甘蔗汁。
pinyin: Dōngtiān jiēshàng cháng yǒu rén mài xīnxiān gānzhè zhī.
english: In winter, people on the street often sell fresh sugarcane juice.

sentence: 年满十八岁的公民都享有选举权。
pinyin: Nián mǎn shíbā suì de gōngmín dōu xiǎngyǒu xuǎnjǔquán.
english: All citizens who are at least eighteen years old have the right to vote.

sentence: 这个新区开通轨道交通后，房价涨了不少。
pinyin: Zhège xīn qū kāitōng guǐdào jiāotōng hòu, fángjià zhǎngle bù shǎo.
english: After the new district got metro access, property prices rose quite a bit.

meaning: to sing the lead vocals; lead singer
sentence: 乐队的主唱嗓音很特别，一听就能认出来。
pinyin: Yuèduì de zhǔchàng sǎngyīn hěn tèbié, yī tīng jiù néng rènchūlái.
english: The band's lead singer has a very distinctive voice — you can recognize it instantly.

sentence: 那部电影的画面非常超现实，看完觉得很奇妙。
pinyin: Nà bù diànyǐng de huàmiàn fēicháng chāo xiànshí, kàn wán juéde hěn qímiào.
english: That film's visuals were extremely surreal — I felt a sense of wonder after watching it.

sentence: 买回来的鱼如果吃不完就放进冷冻室。
pinyin: Mǎi huílái de yú rúguǒ chī bù wán jiù fàng jìn lěngdòng shì.
english: If you can't finish the fish you bought, put it in the freezer.

sentence: 爸爸还保留着几盘旧磁带。
pinyin: Bàba hái bǎoliúzhe jǐ pán jiù cídài.
english: Dad still has a few old cassette tapes.

sentence: 他很担心这次裁员会砸了自己的饭碗。
pinyin: Tā hěn dānxīn zhè cì cáiyuán huì zá le zìjǐ de fànwǎn.
english: He is very worried that this round of layoffs will cost him his job.
